2026-0490
2026-05-26TCCanada Transportation ActAppointment of a member of the Canadian Transportation Agency and his designation as Chairperson of the Canadian Transportation AgencyAppointment of Alain Langlois of Chelsea, Quebec, to be a member of the Canadian Transportation Agency, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years; and his designation as Chairperson of the Canadian Transportation Agency, effective June 1, 2026.N/A
subject: Appointment of a member of the Canadian Transportation Agency and his designation as Chairperson of the Canadian Transportation Agency
precis: Appointment of Alain Langlois of Chelsea, Quebec, to be a member of the Canadian Transportation Agency, to hold office during good behaviour for a term of five years; and his designation as Chairperson of the Canadian Transportation Agency, effective June 1, 2026.
